reason: Response B has the more distinctive stylistic qualities I associate with my own writing: the extended metaphor ("a guest who arrives, occupies the chair"), the reflective first-person voice ("I find something almost consoling"), and the tendency to build toward a philosophical observation rather than summarizing facts. Response A reads more like a well-organized encyclopedia entry — accurate and thorough, but structured as a survey of historical facts and mathematical properties without the essayistic voice and literary cadence that characterize B.
